title: Create: Catworks
description: A very lightweight and simple addon for Create to add more things to automate
body:
**After playing the Create mod for a long time, I’ve noticed that most addons that expand automation either use very unbalanced recipes or focus heavily on progression.**

**Catworks takes a different approach by allowing you to automate most building blocks, adding quality-of-life features—such as a Blaze Burner recipe—and reducing lag by letting certain farms be fully automated with Create, like Blaze Rod production. It also introduces a few progression tweaks, such as a new Precision Mechanism recipe.**

__**Notable changes:**__    
- Zinc from limestone crushing    
- Copper from smooth stone or basalt crushing    
- Blaze rods from lava and coal    
- Ore blocks can now be created via compaction    
- Stone variants can be crafted without ore duplication    
- Netherrack duplication    
- Precision Mechanism now requires electron tubes and wrench deployment    
- Air now passes through funnels, chutes, hoppers, and tunnels    
- Edited Quartz Crushing Recipe from Stuff and Additions

**We have a [Discord](https://discord.gg/5CaF7WqgzY) -- Suggestions and feedback welcome**
